--- 
title: "Ubuntu"
software: 
- CUDA (optional)
login:
- desktop
- cli
os_flavor: linux
os:
- Ubuntu 20.04
- Ubuntu 22.04
data:
- ResearchDrive
- irods-icommands
- Yoda Webdav
- iBridges (python)
packages:
- Custom Packages
gpu: true
admin: true
support: SURF
workspace_cuda: Ubuntu 2204 with CUDA
---

## Description

{{< include ../partials/_cuda.qmd >}}


## Creation

{{< include ../partials/_creation.qmd >}}

## Access

## Data transfer options

## Usage

## Tips
